models.description: path to transcript models gtf output from IsoQuant

model_tpms.description: path to model transcript tpms output from IsoQuant

spliceCont.description: container image for suppa and bedtools + dependencies

rCont.description: container image for R tasks, optparse, rtracklayer + dependencies

outdir.description: directory in which to place process outputs. If running on AWS, should be set to /mnt/workflow/pubdir
